Video.summary: Bob Ross demonstrates how to create a mountain landscape illuminated by the moonlight; using careful brushstrokes, Bob brings this peaceful vista to life.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Moonlight Oval
